testcase.name: adversarial_race_concurrentCreateSevenNodes
testcase.system-out:
Standard Commons Logging discovery in action with spring-jcl: please remove commons-logging.jar from classpath in order to avoid potential conflicts 10:48:21.841 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.longfeng.reviewplan.Application for test class com.longfeng.reviewplan.T06QuestionCreatedE2EIT

testcase.name: ac5_ti4_ti5_calendarFailureOutboxRelay
